case_title: ORAWAN SANGMANEEDEJ VS. GLENN MORRIS BROWN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY SANGMANEEDEJ, ORAWAN AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GLENN MORRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANGMANEEDEJ, ORAWAN AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, GLENN MORRIS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ORAWAN SANGMANEEDEJ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GLENN MORRIS BROWN IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
